name: NatWest Group plc
description: NatWest Group plc is a major British banking and insurance holding company headquartered in Edinburgh, Scotland. As a UK-focused financial institution, it serves over 20 million customers through a diverse portfolio of brands, including NatWest, Royal Bank of Scotland, and Coutts. The group provides a comprehensive range of financial services, spanning personal, commercial, and private banking, as well as corporate finance and investment banking. With a history dating back to 1727, the company operates extensively across the United Kingdom, supporting individuals and businesses with tailored financial solutions and banking products.
